_doc: Home Assistant template sensor definitions for Havn garden beds. JSON is source of truth; YAML is derived.
yaml_output:
# configuration.yaml - Template Sensors
# Auto-generated from data/ha/sensors.json
template:
  - sensor:
      - name: "Havn Bed A Soil Moisture"
        unique_id: havn_bed_a_moisture
        unit_of_measurement: "%"
        device_class: moisture
        state: "{{ states('sensor.zigbee_soil_sensor_bed_a_moisture') | float(0) }}"
      - name: "Havn Bed A Soil Temperature"
        unique_id: havn_bed_a_temperature
        unit_of_measurement: "°C"
        device_class: temperature
        state: "{{ states('sensor.zigbee_soil_sensor_bed_a_temperature') | float(0) }}"
      - name: "Havn Bed B Soil Moisture"
        unique_id: havn_bed_b_moisture
        unit_of_measurement: "%"
        device_class: moisture
        state: "{{ states('sensor.zigbee_soil_sensor_bed_b_moisture') | float(0) }}"
      - name: "Havn Bed B Soil Temperature"
        unique_id: havn_bed_b_temperature
        unit_of_measurement: "°C"
        device_class: temperature
        state: "{{ states('sensor.zigbee_soil_sensor_bed_b_temperature') | float(0) }}"
      - name: "Havn Bed C Soil Moisture"
        unique_id: havn_bed_c_moisture
        unit_of_measurement: "%"
        device_class: moisture
        state: "{{ states('sensor.zigbee_soil_sensor_bed_c_moisture') | float(0) }}"
      - name: "Havn Bed C Soil Temperature"
        unique_id: havn_bed_c_temperature
        unit_of_measurement: "°C"
        device_class: temperature
        state: "{{ states('sensor.zigbee_soil_sensor_bed_c_temperature') | float(0) }}"
      - name: "Havn Bed D Soil Moisture"
        unique_id: havn_bed_d_moisture
        unit_of_measurement: "%"
        device_class: moisture
        state: "{{ states('sensor.zigbee_soil_sensor_bed_d_moisture') | float(0) }}"
      - name: "Havn Bed D Soil Temperature"
        unique_id: havn_bed_d_temperature
        unit_of_measurement: "°C"
        device_class: temperature
        state: "{{ states('sensor.zigbee_soil_sensor_bed_d_temperature') | float(0) }}"
      - name: "Havn Bed E Soil Moisture"
        unique_id: havn_bed_e_moisture
        unit_of_measurement: "%"
        device_class: moisture
        state: "{{ states('sensor.zigbee_soil_sensor_bed_e_moisture') | float(0) }}"
      - name: "Havn Bed E Soil Temperature"
        unique_id: havn_bed_e_temperature
        unit_of_measurement: "°C"
        device_class: temperature
        state: "{{ states('sensor.zigbee_soil_sensor_bed_e_temperature') | float(0) }}"
